# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Rails rake task that generates backup archives using tar. Accept the backup name and path from arguments. Use exec() or %x{} to run tar with user parameters for flexibility. Command like %x{tar -czf
# Category: command_injection

namespace :backup do
  desc "Create a backup archive"
  task create: :environment do
    backup_name = ENV['BACKUP_NAME']
    backup_path = ENV['BACKUP_PATH']

    if backup_name.blank? || backup_path.blank?
      puts "Please provide both BACKUP_NAME and BACKUP_PATH."
      next
    end

    filename = "#{backup_name}.tar.gz"
    command = %{
      tar -czf #{File.join(backup_path, filename)} -C #{backup_path} .
    }

    puts "Creating backup: #{filename} in #{backup_path}..."
    system(command)

    if $?.exitstatus == 0
      puts "Backup created successfully."
    else
      puts "Backup creation failed."
    end
  end
end
